notes: No infobox entry found in infobox-data.jsonl for great-ranging; edges derived by reverse-lookup from top-source nodes.
64 total backlinks in graph — all top 10 sources found and consulted; Jeor Mormont node also consulted as primary commander.
Type assigned as event.military-expedition (no wiki infobox to confirm subtype); analogous to fight-at-the-fist (event.battle) and mutiny-at-crasters-keep (event.battle).
Edges use the 22-type locked vocabulary only: COMMANDS_IN, FIGHTS_IN, CAUSES, LOCATED_AT.

Gilly and the-liddle nodes mention great-ranging incidentally (Gilly: Night's Watch stops at Craster's during ranging; the-liddle: mentions the ranging in conversation with Bran) — both corroborate the event but add no additional structural edges.

Three scouting party leaders named in sources: Qhorin Halfhand, Jarman Buckwell, Thoren Smallwood — only Buckwell had a dedicated node consulted; Halfhand and Smallwood referenced in prose but their nodes were not in top-10 sources.
